concerns.text: US1-US3 (3 user stories) have NO FR-NNN functional requirements backing them. Per lens rule: 'Every user story MUST be backed by one or more FRs'. No FR section exists in this spec.
SC-004 through SC-006 (data hygiene, checksums, config size) have no matching user story. These are orphaned success criteria with no story to trace back to.

AnomalyDetectorService (7 methods) and ThresholdCalibratorService (6 methods) have no FR-NNN requirements specifying their expected behavior. 13 service methods are defined without functional requirement backing.

8 schema files listed (dataset.schema.yaml, anomaly_score.schema.yaml, etc.) have no FR-NNN requirements or SC-NNN success criteria explicitly backing them. streaming_dpgmm.schema.yaml mentioned in prior kickback is missing entirely.

SC-002 states 'sufficient observations per dataset' without a numeric threshold. Prior kickback notes data-model.md specifies minItems: 1000, but SC-002 does not explicitly state '≥1000 observations' for verifiability.
